programme.desc: Grant, who's 34, has been crushed against a brick wall by his own car while he was working on it. Doug, who's 44, is rushed to A&E with severe bleeding from his head. (S10 Ep7/24)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Kayla, who's five, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe. She has a rare form of juvenile arthritis and has spent months at Great Ormond Street under specialist care. (S10 Ep8/24)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: What's the 'flower' in cauliflower wonders Kate? Plus the long life of lemon juice. And a fess-up at the brewery as the meaning of 'bottle conditioned' beer is revealed. (S25 Ep2)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Tiverton, the boys find a moped that brings back memories, and fight over a petrol gauge that Simon wants to upcycle into a clock. (S4 Ep16)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In North Wales, Henry Cole finds an antique cannon in Sue and Josh's storage shed, while Simon O'Brien discovers a croquet set in need of restoration. (S4 Ep17)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: David and Giles take a modern approach to running their B&B, Langland Road, in the Mumbles, near Swansea. But not all of their guests can work out the high-tech offerings.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Margaret Dugdall runs Castle Lodge Hotel in Felixstowe to exacting standards, but not all of the guests are pleased with the decor and there's some horsing around during the group outing.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Gordon and Sandra McCallum host at Bryn Woodlands House in Colwyn Bay, where they take their guests harness racing. But how will one guest react to finding a snake in his bed?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Edward Prophet and Rachel Pickup offer some showbiz razzmatazz at The Tollemache Arms in Cheshire. But the show's nearly over at breakfast when Ed ruins the eggs and sets fire to a towel.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the B&Bers meet for one last time to settle some scores and find out how much they've been paid. Tensions run high before the winner is announced.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: North Kent. Clairvoyant and medium Yvette Tamara hosts the first night, which gets off to a spooky start when two of her guests find a ghostbusting machine. (Ep1/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: North Kent. Data analyst John has a passion for military re-enactment and barks orders at the dinner table. But not everyone likes his Filipino pork stew and psychedelic dessert. (Ep2/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: North Kent. Competitive project manager Yemi Christopher-Soares adds some heat to the competition with a Nigerian-inspired menu. But is her main too spicy for her guests? (Ep3/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: North Kent. Account manager Jono Simm hosts with a wholesome and hearty menu. But some of his guests aren't convinced by his cooking. (Ep4/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: North Kent. Party-loving Lisa Townend hosts the final night with a mysterious menu of French fancies and innovative human roulette entertainment. (Ep5/5)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: John and Sue Blakemore host first, at the Golf House on the Isle of Wight. While breakfast is a big hit, a suspicious stain in the loo proves controversial.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nick and his best friend Layla welcome their rivals to The New Inn in St John's Wood, London. But guests John and Sue are left cold by their 'corporate and impersonal' room.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At The Bunkroom in Chester, David is determined to prove that hostelling is for everyone - even if his wife isn't convinced. What will the guests make of the bunk beds and budget breakfast?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to John Graham's The B&B in Blackpool, where competition between the guests builds during a game of tenpin bowling. And there's tension at the dinner table.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers meet one last time to find out how much they've been paid and confront their critics. Tension runs high, but who will be crowned best value B&B of the week?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are in Hertfordshire, where cheesemonger Julia wants the rural idyll, and Bollywood singer Priti and data analyst Shakti are keen to keep their links to London. (S38 Ep3)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or...
programme.desc: ...List It: In Lancing, Gloria and Tom are at stalemate over their Victorian semi by the sea. Can Kirstie work her magic, or will Phil's enticing properties lure them to list it? (S7 Ep2)

programme.title: New: Blanca

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode focuses on children and parenthood. Louie, who's three, has been hit by a car. Josh, who's 14, injured his ankle while riding a BMX with his dad. (S10 Ep12/24)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Heli-medics race to a skydiver who's suffered serious injuries after crashing into a house. And there's a race across the country to reach a man who's fallen 40 feet from a ladder. (S3 Ep9)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Graham and Barbara pride themselves on offering basic facilities for great value at the White Swan Hotel in West Yorkshire. But will their guests be happy to pay a supplement for breakfast?

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.desc: Paul and Tracy are looking for their dream holiday home near Lake Vinuela in southern Spain, for Tracy's 50th birthday. Can Danni Menzies find the perfect present for their £150k?

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: This episode follows actor Sean Simons' epic bid to turn castle ruins in Ireland into a spectacular fantasy home the hard way: with no architect and in the middle of a recession.

programme.desc: Merseyside. Fun-loving oil and gas co-ordinator Danielle Greenwood hopes to impress her guests with her down-to-earth menu and warm and welcoming style of hosting. (Ep1/5)

programme.desc: Merseyside. Pastoral care manager Steven Booth names each of his courses after songs by his favourite singer, Tina Turner. But tensions rise when one guest puts her foot in it. (Ep2/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Merseyside. Primary school teacher Anna Senior plans a fairy-tale evening, featuring a Mad Hatter's soup and a special pork dish cooked three ways. (Ep4/5)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: After a wonderful week in Wales, the B&Bers meet up once more to debate their differences and find out who's won. But will some lingering vendettas spoil the party?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Jim, who's a doctor, has had a collision with a van while cycling to work. Chef Mimi, who has cut her thumb, takes a shine to the junior doctor who's treating her. (S10 Ep15/24)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A visitor to a horse fair in Cumbria needs help after a cardiac arrest. A 12-year-old girl is treated for multiple injuries following a collision with a vehicle. (S3 Ep10)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Grant, who's 34, has been crushed against a brick wall by his own car while he was working on it. Doug, who's 44, is rushed to A&E with severe bleeding from his head. (S10 Ep7/24)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Kayla, who's five, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe. She has a rare form of juvenile arthritis and has spent months at Great Ormond Street under specialist care. (S10 Ep8/24)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Graham and Barbara pride themselves on offering basic facilities for great value at the White Swan Hotel in West Yorkshire. But will their guests be happy to pay a supplement for breakfast?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Malcolm and Fiona hope to show their guests an alternative way of life at The Old Mill House in Bridport, Dorset. But some aren't convinced and the meditation session gets a mixed response.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Rachel and Dan Lonergan host at The Brighton Inn, where the guests clown around as they learn some circus skills. But some of them are on the offensive...

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Leah Charles-King helps Kerry and Stewart find a little oasis on Lanzarote, that all their family can escape to. With a budget of £120k, can Leah find their paradise?

programme.desc: Paul and Tracy are looking for their dream holiday home near Lake Vinuela in southern Spain, for Tracy's 50th birthday. Can Danni Menzies find the perfect present for their £150k?

programme.title: Grand Designs

programme.title: Grand Designs

programme.desc: Merseyside. Fun-loving oil and gas co-ordinator Danielle Greenwood hopes to impress her guests with her down-to-earth menu and warm and welcoming style of hosting. (Ep1/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Merseyside. Pastoral care manager Steven Booth names each of his courses after songs by his favourite singer, Tina Turner. But tensions rise when one guest puts her foot in it. (Ep2/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Merseyside. Primary school teacher Anna Senior plans a fairy-tale evening, featuring a Mad Hatter's soup and a special pork dish cooked three ways. (Ep4/5)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.desc: Kayla and Luke welcome their daughter Ariah. Brianna's family isn't as excited about her new boyfriend as she is. Kiaya's surprise date doesn't go as planned. (S2, ep16)

programme.title: Catfish: Filtered Fakers
programme.desc: Rod met Ebony on a dating web site four years ago, now it's time for the two to meet in person. Is Ebony who she says she is? What will happen when they meet in real life for the first time? (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish: Filtered Fakers
programme.desc: Dianela fled her home in Venezuela to start a new life with José, a man she's been in a relationship with but has never met! Nev and Kamie tackle this mystery to get Dianela answers. (S8, ep19)

programme.title: Catfish: Filtered Fakers
programme.desc: Derek meets Kristen on Facebook. After developing a deep love for each other, Derek's ready to meet her. Is Kristen his dream girl, or is Derek out of luck again? (S2, ep14)

programme.title: Catfish: Filtered Fakers
programme.desc: Danny is intent on building a life with his online love, despite her violent past. But when he enlists Nev and Max to help him meet her, they discover she may have ties to a former Catfish! (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Help! I'm In A Secret...
programme.desc: ... Relationship! Despite living and working together, music producer Donald has never met his fiancée Stormi's family or friends. Rahne and Travis are here to help Donald find out why. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Help! I'm In A Secret...
programme.desc: ... Relationship! Rick met girlfriend Shanelle on social media. Their first date lasted until the sun came up! But three years later, Rick still hasn't met Shanelle's family or friends. (S1, ep10)

programme.desc: Kayla and Luke welcome their daughter Ariah. Brianna's family isn't as excited about her new boyfriend as she is. Kiaya's surprise date doesn't go as planned. (S2, ep16)

programme.title: Catfish: Filtered Fakers
programme.desc: Rico wants to move to England to care for his ailing mother, but his intense online relationship with Ja'mari, an international male model, is giving him second thoughts about leaving. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: Filtered Fakers
programme.desc: Rod met Ebony on a dating web site four years ago, now it's time for the two to meet in person. Is Ebony who she says she is? What will happen when they meet in real life for the first time? (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish: Filtered Fakers
programme.desc: Dianela fled her home in Venezuela to start a new life with José, a man she's been in a relationship with but has never met! Nev and Kamie tackle this mystery to get Dianela answers. (S8, ep19)

programme.title: Catfish: Filtered Fakers
programme.desc: Derek meets Kristen on Facebook. After developing a deep love for each other, Derek's ready to meet her. Is Kristen his dream girl, or is Derek out of luck again? (S2, ep14)

programme.title: Catfish: Filtered Fakers
programme.desc: Danny is intent on building a life with his online love, despite her violent past. But when he enlists Nev and Max to help him meet her, they discover she may have ties to a former Catfish! (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Help! I'm In A Secret...
programme.desc: ... Relationship! Despite living and working together, music producer Donald has never met his fiancée Stormi's family or friends. Rahne and Travis are here to help Donald find out why. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Help! I'm In A Secret...
programme.desc: ... Relationship! Rick met girlfriend Shanelle on social media. Their first date lasted until the sun came up! But three years later, Rick still hasn't met Shanelle's family or friends. (S1, ep10)

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders
programme.desc: The rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC makeover. Under the scrutiny of Kelli Finglass, new hairstyles and make up applications give the girls the DCC look. (S7, ep4)

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders
programme.desc: Kelli is out sick so Kitty Carter fills in and runs the first rehearsal of the week. Kitty has a no holds barred approach as she calls out several girls who have messy routines. (S7, ep5)

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old Luke from Essex has a passion for designer shopping and loves to travel in style, while single mum Steph saves all year for her budget break. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Just Tattoo Of Us
programme.desc: Best mates Jack and Grant teach each other lessons with bold tattoos. Bristol beauties Beth and Merissa get emotional. Tasmin gives boyfriend Levi one of the biggest tattoos ever. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: R.E.M: MTV Unplugged
programme.desc: Seminal alt-rockers R.E.M. go acoustic in this acclaimed MTV Unplugged performance, playing hits like "Losing My Religion" and "The One I Love", live from TRL Studios in New York in 2001.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Respectable dad Stephen aims to see the back of a crude tattoo he had 20 years ago. Ex-solider Rob's phallic self-portrait is a step too far, and Leeanneah has lyrics tattooed on her chest. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Basic Instinct 2
programme.desc: Novelist Catherine Tramell is once more in trouble with the law, and appoints psychiatrist Dr. Michael Glass to evaluate her. Glass is entranced by Tramell and lured into a seductive game. (2006)

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: O'S*** learns some unsettling information about his case. Dutchess makes a surprise appearance at Walt's baby shower. While Dutch is working late, Ceaser makes an unexpected decision. (S2, ep15)

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: After getting caught cheating on Dutchess, Ceaser shows up at her apartment to get his things and is shocked to see the cops there. Dutchess hosts a girl's night out and invites Sassy. (S2, ep16)

programme.title: Ink Master: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: Eighteen artists arrive ready to fight for themselves but instead find they must work in teams divided by gender. Battle lines are drawn, then tested, in the Ink Master Battle of the Sexes. (S12, ep1)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: MTV Cribs US
programme.desc: Jimmy O. Yang takes MTV around his vibrant Los Angeles digs. MTV's Catfish, Nev Schulman, gives the exposé on his family friendly abode. Hannah Brown, charms us with her Santa Monica crib. (S19, ep11)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: After hiding her pregnancy for eight months, Izabella is forced to reconsider who her true friends are. She then risks her family ties when her boyfriend betrays their trust. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: In a visit to Texas, Farrah challenges Daniel about their relationship, Maci and Ryan argue about Ryan's new girlfriend and Amber looks for a new home for her and Leah. (S4, ep10)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: After a Covid exposure at the girls' school, Leah has to make some difficult decisions. Devoin lets Nova down and Briana must pick up the pieces. Jade wants to take things slow with Sean. (S10, ep24)

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young & Pregnant
programme.desc: Rachel's ex is back. Brianna's relationship takes a surprise turn. Kayla considers going back home. Ashley takes Holly to Los Angeles. Kiaya tries to change Teazha's mind. (S2, ep17)

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Jade and Cheyenne visit Briana in Florida and all eyes are on her and Devoin's relationship. (S1, ep22)

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Catelynn is heartbroken when her family attacks her on social media. Sean plans a surprise for Jade. Zach meets with Bar to discuss the beef between Cheyenne and Ashley. (S1, ep23)

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Cheyenne struggles with Ryder's sleep habits. Leah helps her dad find a rehab but cuts him off when he offends her. Ashley is upset with Bar for not being prepared for his court date. (S1, ep24)

programme.title: Catfish: Hopeless Romantics
programme.desc: Mama doesn't always know best. Shuntay enlists the help of Nev and Max after her mum begins talking about marriage and uprooting her family to be with a man who refuses to meet in person. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: Hopeless Romantics
programme.desc: When Sandra learns that her granddaughter, Yasmine, sent money to an online boyfriend, she asks Nev and Max for help. And they soon discover there's much more that Yasmine has been hiding. (S6, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: Hopeless Romantics
programme.desc: Cody claims he met Brittany in real life. He's deep in love and has sent her thousands of dollars! Cody's concerned grandmother calls for Nev and Kamie's help in hunting down Brittany! (S8, ep84)

programme.title: Catfish: Hopeless Romantics
programme.desc: Steven is due to graduate high school, instead of planning for college he wants to move to California for his online love, Samm. Steven's mum is sceptical of Samm's identity. (S4, ep15)

programme.title: Catfish: Hopeless Romantics
programme.desc: Gabby was heartbroken when she discovered her online love Kendrick was killed! When Gabby's cousin suspects she's been mourning a fictional character, she calls in Nev and Kamie to help. (S8, ep56)

programme.title: Catfish: Hopeless Romantics
programme.desc: Mandy is in love with a guy that gives her everything but the truth! Mandy's son has had enough and calls in Nev and Max. But following the clues only takes them deeper down the rabbit hole. (S7, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish: Hopeless Romantics
programme.desc: Andrew thinks he's met the perfect match in Zac until a text message from a friend reveals something shocking. Nev and Max try to uncover whether Zac could be keeping a big secret. (S5, ep20)

programme.title: Catfish: Hopeless Romantics
programme.desc: Hayley met Britani on Instagram and fell fast in love. Now, with Hayley planning a dangerous trip to meet Britani, her sister is worried and calls Nev and Kamie to find answers! (S8, ep58)

programme.title: Ink Master Redemption
programme.desc: Rival Artists design head-to-head to please unhappy Canvases, but only one will receive a shot at redemption. Josh Hibbard and Kyle Dunbar, and brothers Robbie and Jayvo return. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: Ink Master Redemption
programme.desc: Nick Deangelo, Ryan Eternal, Jason Clay Dunn and Steve Tefft return to impress their canvases for a shot at redemption. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: A thrilling zipline date and a sizzling sausage party provide the backdrop for two more naked newbies to enter the house. Meanwhile, a love triangle threatens to derail a strong friendship. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Respectable dad Stephen aims to see the back of a crude tattoo he had 20 years ago. Ex-solider Rob's phallic self-portrait is a step too far, and Leeanneah has lyrics tattooed on her chest. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Hitler's Last Stand

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation

programme.title: Drain Loch Ness

programme.title: Secrets of Neuschwanstein Castle
programme.desc: Go on a journey through one of the most iconic castles in the world as it undergoes a complete restoration. 7+

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation

programme.title: To Catch A Smuggler

programme.title: Bid & Destroy

programme.title: To Catch A Smuggler

programme.title: To Catch A Smuggler

programme.desc: The entire Earth is affected by climate change occurring with a greater speed and scale than ever before - this programme uses scientific data and the latest findings to raise awareness on its impact.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: A Fashion Night: Fireworks lit up the skies practically every summer's night for a time during the Edo period; it was a chance for women to dress up, let loose, and grab the attention of male suitors.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: Japanese researchers have been uncovering previously unknown effects of vitamin C in the body. We report on their latest findings, such as the power to strengthen the bones and prevent dementia.

programme.title: The Imperial Palace
programme.desc: Thoughtful preparation and meticulous attention to detail contribute to a warm welcome for distinguished guests at the Imperial Palace - join us as we go behind the scenes.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Bodies. As AI, digital and virtual spaces take over, thinking about physical bodies is more important than ever - explore the role of designs which are rooted in human physicality.

programme.title: Japanese Fireworks Truth
programme.desc: Japanese fireworks have long enchanted people with their spherical shape and range of colours - we trace the rise of fireworks in Japan and also examine the 400-year-old mystery of the senko hanabi.

programme.desc: Kyle Card hikes along a 1000km trail following the Pacific Coast in northern Japan - he discovers local lifestyles, stunning nature, traces of the area's 2011 disaster and resilient people.

programme.desc: With its splendid branches and white plum blossoms, this famous painting is known for captivating Van Gogh - discover why people were able to tell this was a specific tree at Kameido Umeyashiki.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The Boss Babysitter: Mom and Dad Templeton do the unthinkable: leave Boss Baby and Tim under the authority of a babysitter! (S1, ep 7)

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: Barking Up the Wrong Tree: Sonic is shocked that the Boscage Maze "Monster" is Amy AKA Thorn Rose. Wielding a Paradox Prism shard, Thorn wages war on the tree-dwelling Scavengers. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: The Thundermans
programme.desc: Beat the Parents: Nervous about meeting his girlfriend's parents, Max enlists help from Phoebe, whose charms backfire and leave Max banned from ever seeing his girlfriend again. (S3, ep 26)

programme.title: The Thundermans
programme.desc: Can't Spy Me Love: After seeing a cute guy but missing her chance to meet him, Phoebe accesses the Hero League's villain search software to track him down. (S3, ep 22)

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Text, Lies, & Video: When a video of Henry and Ray transforming into Kid Danger and Captain Man gets out, Henry must get it back so that his secret identity isn't revealed. (S2, ep 12)

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Opposite Universe: Henry and Charlotte are transported into an opposite universe where Ray and Schwoz are evil and want to destroy Piper. They must figure out how to get back. (S2, ep 13)

programme.title: City Adventures
programme.desc: The Trojan Slooshie: The Ice Cream Truck Bandits waylay the police force with frozen drinks, giving the officers Glacial Brain Freeze. (S4, ep 3b)

programme.title: City Adventures
programme.desc: Born To Direct: Maddy's filmmaking ambitions go wild when she offers to direct a simple fire safety video. (S4, ep 4a)

programme.title: City Adventures
programme.desc: The Wexler Deflection Conjecture: Depressed, Dr. Wexler quits science. But when a meteor threatens the city, Billy and Maddy must convince him to return, and save them all! (S4, ep 4b)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Meteorite finds a night club in the forest in 'Disco Smurf', then in 'Dwayne's New Toy', Diaper Daddy is looking for a more loving family after being betrayed by Handy. (S4, ep 4)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Tree of Knowledge: The Smurfs unwittingly ask Dimwitty for advice when he gets stuck in a hollowed out tree, thinking they've found the Tree of Knowledge. (S3, ep 7b)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Dwayne is turned into a tracker dog to help his uncle to catch the Smurfs in 'Gargamel's Doggy', then in 'Drummer Girl', Gargamel bewitches Meteorite's drum and hypnotizes the Smurfies. (S4, ep 5)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin tells Theodore that he can turn rubbish into sweets in 'Alvin's Secret Powers', then in 'Warbie', The Chipmunks find a baby bird that's fallen from its nest. (S1, ep 24)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: The boys accidently break Dave's new flat screen TV in 'The Fugitives', and in 'Sherlock Chipmunk', Jeanette and Eleanor act as Sherlock Holmes and Watson when Theodore's teddy disappears. (S3, ep 10)

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family scrambles to prep for inspection in 'Just a Little Pipe Problem', then in 'Camp Chuck', Chuck's theatre camp goes haywire. (S2, ep 5)

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: Cracking Down: Sonic tells Nine about Ghost Hill, its shard, and its blueprint to reassemble the Paradox Prism to restart the real world. But all Nine hears is that there's a fourth shard. (S1, ep 15)

programme.title: Max & the Midknights
programme.desc: Honksgiving!: Max and the Midknights wash up on the shore of strange lands where a holiday puts their party in danger. Sir Gadabout ventures out and makes a shocking discovery. (S3, ep 5)

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: El Apasionado Negocio de la Ninera: Frederic makes a play to take over the town's babysitters by instituting "senior sitting". (S1, ep 20)

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family gets grounded in 'Prison Break', then in 'Canyon Valley Film Festival', Jack enters the town's film festival. (S2, ep 6)

programme.title: Erin and Aaron
programme.desc: Lose Yourself: Erin invites Aaron's friends over but discovers that Aaron hasn't been entirely truthful with them. (S1, ep 8)

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Revenge Of The Brit Brats: Gwen and Ruby return and, while pretending to be friendly, drive a wedge between Sam and Cat. When Sam and Cat catch on, they turn the tables. (S1, ep 9)

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Motorcycle Mystery: Sam, Dice and Goomer go out and leave Cat at home to study. Later, they discover that Sam's motorcycle is missing and Cat can't remember the day! (S1, ep 10)

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: Annie's part of a science project is threatened by 'Distractions', and then in 'The Giving Chair', Annie and Pony discover the comfiest chair in the world that also may have superpowers. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: Rock, Paper, Scissors
programme.desc: Paper vows to get a holiday of his own in 'National Paper Day', and in 'Helping With The Groceries', Scissors goes deep into his mind to decide on whether to help bring in the groceries. (S1, ep 18)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: Jeanette and the Chipmunks rescue a chimpanzee in 'Chimpmania', then in 'Dad Jokes', Dave will be hosting an auction where he'll have to tell jokes, but will Alvin tell him he's not funny? (S4, ep 19)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: Eleanor enters a knight competition in 'A Knight's Tail', and then in 'The Lifeguard', Alvin and Eleanor train to be lifeguards. Theodore flunks, but saves the day. Oops, spoiler alert. (S5, ep 22)

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Jack has his first sleepover in 'Meats of Strength', then in 'Dead Ed's', the kids have a surreal restaurant adventure. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The Constipation Situation: Boss Baby struggles to take a sick day even though a mysterious baby cry is wreaking havoc on the neighbourhood baby-love. (S1, ep 6)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: Miss Miller gets robbed in 'The Great Chipmunk Detective', and in 'Guitar Hero', Alvin begrudgingly agrees to teach Miss Smith guitar, but she won't reveal why she needs to learn. (S3, ep 25)

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: Pony proves that even a simple task can become a wild adventure in 'Haircut', then in 'Gerry's Birthday', Annie and Pony try to give Gerry the best birthday ever. (S1, ep 6)

programme.title: Rock, Paper, Scissors
programme.desc: Scissors Gets a Job: When Scissors runs out of money, he tries to become a janitor but discovers that the job involves way more skill than he initially thought. (S1, ep 6)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: Dave, Simon and Theodore are worried for Alvin's safety in 'The Karate Kidder', then in 'Playing Favourites', Alvin and Theo challenge Simon to a go-cart race. (S3, ep 1)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin talks Dave into a poor scheme in 'Tour Bus', then in 'Game Show', Alvin signs the Chipmunks up for a game show that forces losing contestants to perform dangerous stunts. (S4, ep 7)

programme.title: Max & the Midknights
programme.desc: Honksgiving!: Max and the Midknights wash up on the shore of strange lands where a holiday puts their party in danger. Sir Gadabout ventures out and makes a shocking discovery. (S3, ep 5)

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: El Apasionado Negocio de la Ninera: Frederic makes a play to take over the town's babysitters by instituting "senior sitting". (S1, ep 20)

programme.title: Rock, Paper, Scissors
programme.desc: Rock, Paper, and Scissors try to transform their unusual car into a prize-winning vehicle in 'The Susan', then in 'Eyebrows', Paper gives Rock mechanical eyebrows to help with an audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob works the grill at the toughest joint in town in 'The Salty Sponge', then in 'Karen for Spot', Karen looks after Spot while Plankton goes out of town.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family gets grounded in 'Prison Break', then in 'Canyon Valley Film Festival', Jack enters the town's film festival. (S2, ep 6)

programme.title: Erin and Aaron
programme.desc: I Want You Back: Erin and Sylvia hang out more making Aaron feel left out. Natasha tries to gain power at school. (S1, ep 9)

programme.title: Monster High 2
programme.desc: Clawdeen and the ghouls are back again for a second Monster High movie, right here on Nickelodeon!

programme.title: Drama Club
programme.desc: S.A.D.: Darcy is excited to go to the school dance this year, but Mack is determined to avoid it at all costs after an embarrassing incident at the last one. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Twinfection: To prove that she's clever, Cat plays a trick on Sam using a pair of twins that they are babysitting. So Sam turns to her own twin, Melanie, to play a trick on Cat. (S1, ep 16)

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Summer of Secrets: Chloe must attend summer school, and Max is assigned to be her teacher. While they will be busy all summer, Phoebe goes solo with a new superhero named Captain Perfect. (S2, ep 2)

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry's Jelly: After Jasper is lauded for being a local hero, Henry becomes jealous that Kid Danger is the one getting thanks while Henry himself gets nothing. (S2, ep 8)

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Text, Lies, & Video: When a video of Henry and Ray transforming into Kid Danger and Captain Man gets out, Henry must get it back so that his secret identity isn't revealed. (S2, ep 12)

programme.title: The Thundermans
programme.desc: All the President's Thunder-Men: After their requests drive Kickbutt to quit, Max and Phoebe get what they want when Hank is made SuperPresident. But being the First Family takes its toll. (S4, ep 32)

programme.title: The Thundermans
programme.desc: Four Supes and a Baby: Phoebe drags Billy and Nora to the park to meet her crush and his baby brother. When Max takes the younger kids home, they accidentally grab the wrong one! (S2, ep 1)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin kidnaps Simon's robot Geizmo in 'Geizmo's Day Out', then in 'Unbored', when Dave takes away Alvin's phone, the boredom Alvin experiences is enough to drive him crazy. (S4, ep 25)

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany wind up in a battle royale in 'Bubble Wrap', and in 'Chess Mate', a cute girl joins the chess club, so Alvin enlists Jeanette to teach him to play so he can join too. (S5, ep 21)

programme.title: The Thundermans
programme.desc: Robin Hood - Prince of Pheebs: When Chloe announces that Max is her favourite, Phoebe tells a bedtime story about the great Phoebe Hood and the evil Maxingham. (S3, ep 25)

programme.title: The Thundermans
programme.desc: Aunt Misbehavin': Max & Phoebe give their mom the ultimate birthday surprise by tracking down her long lost sister, but then they discover that they've been feuding for years. (S3, ep 19)

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Danger & Thunder Part 1: Captain Man, Kid Danger & Phoebe Thunderman infiltrate a villain meeting in Swellview where the villains plan to destroy Captain Man and Kid Danger. (S2, ep 14)

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Danger & Thunder Part 2: Captain Man, Kid Danger & Phoebe Thunderman infiltrate a villain meeting in Swellview where the villains plan to destroy Captain Man and Kid Danger. (S2, ep 15)

programme.title: City Adventures
programme.desc: Billy to the Maxx: Billy worries he won't meet his Mom's expectations when she signs them up for a charity event's team physical challenges. (S4, ep 5a)

programme.title: City Adventures
programme.desc: The Good, The Bad, and the Turtles: Maddy takes in two lost turtles, unaware they belong to rivals Sinclair and Fendrich, who believe she's kidnapped them. (S4, ep 5b)

programme.title: City Adventures
programme.desc: Mr. Produce Buys The Farm: After buying a farm to grow his own produce, Mr. Produce becomes convinced neighbouring farmers are out to get him. (S4, ep 6b)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: We Smurfed on the Moon: Leaf has a new, powerful magic wand, but doesn't know how to use it. She makes a mistake and turns off the moon! The Smurfs fly to the moon to turn it back on again. (S4, ep 6)
